info.english_meaning: to serve to devote oneself practise
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: Sevf ' ityapyeke  ' secane ' iti kecit  ' sevf ' iti pare  dantyAditvaM BAzyaviroDAt upekzyam  BAzye ' ajAdantyaparAH sAdayaH zopadeSAH ... ' iti dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'etAnAsevate yastu tapastasya prahIyate' (BA0 SAM0 19218) Asevate'sakft sevate juzate Bajate
'yatrAprAyaScittaM karmAsevate prAyaScittavati' (Apa0 Da0 11811) Asevate tAtparyeRa karotIti yAvat
'nizevate SrAntamanA viviktam' (SA0 55) nizevate sevate Bajate nirviSatItyarTaH
'vipatpratIkArapareRa maNgalaM nizevyate BUtisamutsukena vA' (ku0 576) nizevyate pracaryate Acaryate
'vEKAnasaM kimanayA vratamA pradAnAd vyApAraroDi madanasya nizevitavyam' (SA0 127) nizevitavyaM jozaRIyam AcaraRIyam
'evamatandritastrIMScaturo vA mAsAn kriyApaTamupaseveta' (suSruta0 ci0 528) upaseveta SIlayet
'tataH sTitezu tezvatra nAnABogopasevizu' (kaTA0 44116) nAnA pfTagviDAn BogAnBuYjAnezvityarTaH

'candanena mahArheRa yasyANgamupasevitam malena tasyANgamida kaTamAryasya sevyate' (rA0 29935).. upasevitaM suraBIkftam vAsa upasevAyAmiti curAdizu paWyate tatra upasevA suganDIkaraRamAheti muktasaMSayam
